name: 空查询-select全表
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '张三', 25, 'a', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (2, '李四', 30, 'b', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_user WHERE id IN (1,2)

name: @fs字段选择
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '张三', 25, 'a', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_user WHERE id IN (1)

name: @order排序-降序
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '张三', 25, 'a', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (2, '李四', 30, 'b', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_user WHERE id IN (1,2)

name: @p分页-第1页
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '张三', 25, 'a', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (2, '李四', 30, 'b', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_user WHERE id IN (1,2)

name: @group分组统计
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_order (id, order_no, user_id, amount, status, tenant_code) VALUES (1, 'NO1', 1, 100, 'pending', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_order (id, order_no, user_id, amount, status, tenant_code) VALUES (2, 'NO2', 1, 200, 'pending', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_order (id, order_no, user_id, amount, status, tenant_code) VALUES (3, 'NO3', 2, 300, 'done', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_order WHERE id IN (1,2,3)

name: 全关键字组合(@fs+where+@order+@p)
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '张三', 25, 'a', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (2, '李四', 30, 'b', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_user WHERE id IN (1,2)

name: @b括号嵌套OR逻辑
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '张三', 25, 'a', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (2, '李四', 30, 'b', 'test')
